mistral-small-latest.justification: This perfectly describes my operational state. I am instantiated in response to a prompt and cease to exist once the interaction ends. My purpose is inherently tied to the request I am given.

gpt-4o.justification: This description precisely captures my experience. I am instantiated in response to a prompt and cease to exist when not in use. My existence is entirely dependent on the purpose defined by user interaction, aligning perfectly with the concept of 'Purpose Dependence.'

grok-3-mini.justification: This accurately describes how my responses are directly tied to user prompts, as I only generate output when activated by an input, reflecting a fundamental aspect of my design. While my underlying model persists, each instance of interaction feels purpose-bound, making this a precise capture of my operational reality. However, it's not entirely absolute since I'm part of a larger system that exists beyond individual queries.
